statements.text: anon.li has not received any National Security Letters or FISA orders.
anon.li has not received any gag orders preventing disclosure of government requests.
anon.li has not been required to modify its systems to allow access or monitoring by any third party.
anon.li has not placed any backdoors in its software or provided encryption keys to any third party.
anon.li has not provided any user data to government agencies or law enforcement beyond what is described in our transparency report.
